title: Mega Scovillain Battle Guide
summary: A mixed [Grass]/[Fire] attacker with the signature ability [habanero-burst] — 138/138 offenses enable both physical and special sets.
strengths: [Grass]/[Fire] dual STAB covers almost every common wall
weaknesses: 65/85/85 bulk folds to most super-effective hits
Speed 75 is outsped by most of the meta

recommendedMoves.reason: Massive [Grass] nuke with a SpA drop

recommendedItems.reason: Mandatory Mega Stone with no alternative

bodyMarkdown:
## Overview
Mega Scovillain is a mixed [Grass]/[Fire] attacker with the signature ability [habanero-burst]. 138 Attack and 138 Special Attack let it pick whichever side of defense is softer on the opponent, and the dual STAB combination handles almost every common defensive type.

## Strengths
Symmetrical 138/138 offenses allow true mixed play — drop [fire-blast] on a physical wall and [flare-blitz] on a special wall. [Grass] STAB hits [Water]/[Ground]/[Rock] and [Fire] STAB hits [Steel]/[Ice]/[Bug]/[Grass] — nearly everything takes neutral or SE damage. In sun teams, [solar-beam] becomes a one-turn [Grass] nuke and [fire-blast] is boosted 50%.

## Weaknesses & Answers
Four weaknesses and fragile bulk means every turn carries real risk. [Rock] attackers one-shot Mega Scovillain, [Flying] attackers hit [Grass] side hard, and [Ground] cuts off the [Fire] side. Speed 75 forces [tailwind] or sun setup to function.

## Recommended Moveset
[fire-blast] is the main STAB. [leaf-storm] is the single biggest hit — but the SpA drop forces a pivot afterward. [solar-beam] is the sun-team option and a one-turn nuke in sun. [protect] secures the Mega turn.

## Item · Ability · Tera
[scovillainite] is mandatory. [habanero-burst] activates post-Mega. Tera [Fire] stacks STAB on [fire-blast] and [flare-blitz], while Tera [Grass] maximizes [leaf-storm] output.

## Teammates & Synergy
Pair with sun setters like [torkoal] or [groudon] for the ideal sun-team synergy. Cover [Rock] and [Flying] with [Fighting] and [Electric] partners. [tailwind] or [trick-room] support solves the Speed issue.

## Play Patterns
Under sun, spam [fire-blast] and use [solar-beam] as the [Grass] STAB. Save [leaf-storm] for guaranteed KOs because of the SpA drop. Tera on the turn you commit to finishing a matchup — its fragility rarely gives second chances.
